heading: STOP HARBORING IRANIAN PETROLEUM
label: VI STOP HARBORING IRANIAN PETROLEUM
notes: CodificationSubchapter was enacted as the Stop Harboring Iranian Petroleum Act, also known as the SHIP Act, and not as part of the Comprehensive Iran Sanctions, Accountability, and Divestment Act of 2010 which comprises this chapter.
